name: PBKDF2 password hashing
task: Create /tmp/eval_pbkdf/pw.py with two functions: hash_password(password, iterations=10000) returns 'iterations$saltHex$dkHex' using PBKDF2-HMAC-SHA256 with a fresh 16-byte secrets.token_bytes salt. verify_password(password, stored) returns True iff the password matches; use secrets.compare_digest.

validation.script: import importlib.util; spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('m','/tmp/eval_pbkdf/pw.py'); mod = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); spec.loader.exec_module(mod); h = mod.hash_password('hunter2', iterations=1000); assert mod.verify_password('hunter2', h); assert not mod.verify_password('wrong', h); h2 = mod.hash_password('hunter2', iterations=1000); assert h != h2; assert mod.verify_password('hunter2', h2); print('OK')
